channel.title: SnapTra Translator Beta Changelog
channel.description: Beta releases for early access to new features.

item.title: Version 1.3.8-beta.0
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.8-beta.0

Fixed

  • gate selected text translation

item.title: Version 1.3.7
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.7

Added

  • add word learning module with spaced repetition
  • add localization support for Learning module
  • add Show Dock Icon toggle in System tab
  • add Copy to Clipboard option for word and sentence translation
  • add configurable third-party dictionary sources
  • add selected text translation flow
  • add pin and copy buttons for paragraph overlay
  • set system dictionary as default first source

Changed

  • add System tab and move launch/menu bar/language settings
  • optimize storage and add auto cleanup for learning module
  • add localizations for auto cleanup feature
  • add System tab label translations
  • remove Spanish language support
  • stop TimelineView animation when highlight window is hidden
  • remove fixed width from filter picker for compact layout
  • increase general tab content height

Fixed

  • persist showDockIcon setting across app restarts
  • hide Dock icon immediately when toggle is turned off
  • move Learning tab below pronunciation options
  • improve selected text translation accuracy and readability
  • improve selected text accessibility lookup
  • avoid unsupported predicate forced unwrap
  • prevent settings window from showing on restart
  • restore paragraph original selection
  • align original copy button
  • improve paragraph panel dragging
  • correct sentence panel pin and escape states

item.title: Version 1.3.7-beta.6
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.7-beta.6

  • Version 1.3.7-beta.6 release

item.title: Version 1.3.7-beta.5
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.7-beta.5

Changed

  • set system dictionary as default first source

item.title: Version 1.3.7-beta.4
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.7-beta.4

Changed

  • set system dictionary as default first source

item.title: Version 1.3.7-beta.3
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.7-beta.3

Added

  • add pin and copy buttons for paragraph overlay
  • add selected text translation flow
  • add configurable third-party sources
  • add Copy to Clipboard option for word and sentence translation
  • add Show Dock Icon toggle in System tab
  • add localization support for Learning module
  • add word learning module with spaced repetition

Changed

  • increase general tab content height from 580 to 650
  • stop TimelineView animation when highlight window hidden
  • add localizations for auto cleanup feature
  • optimize storage and add auto cleanup
  • add third-party dictionaries design
  • add System tab label translations
  • remove Spanish language support
  • add System tab and move launch/menu bar/language settings
  • remove fixed width from filter picker for compact layout

Fixed

  • prevent settings window from showing on restart
  • restore beta appcast publishing
  • restore paragraph original selection
  • align original copy button
  • improve paragraph panel dragging
  • correct sentence panel pin and escape states
  • inline paragraph original header
  • add title for original text in paragraph overlay
  • improve selected text translation accuracy and readability
  • avoid unsupported predicate forced unwrap
  • improve selected text accessibility lookup
  • persist showDockIcon setting across app restarts
  • hide Dock icon immediately when toggle is turned off
  • move Learning tab below pronunciation options

item.title: Version 1.3.7-beta.2
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.7-beta.2

Added

  • add pin and copy buttons for paragraph overlay

Fixed

  • align original copy button
  • improve paragraph panel dragging
  • correct sentence panel pin and escape states
  • inline paragraph original header
  • add title for original text in paragraph overlay

item.title: Version 1.3.7-beta.1
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.7-beta.1

Added

  • add selected text translation flow
  • add configurable third-party sources

Changed

  • increase general tab content height from 580 to 650
  • stop TimelineView animation when highlight window hidden
  • add localizations for auto cleanup feature
  • optimize storage and add auto cleanup
  • add third-party dictionaries design
  • add System tab label translations

Fixed

  • improve selected text translation accuracy and readability
  • avoid unsupported predicate forced unwrap
  • improve selected text accessibility lookup

item.title: Version 1.3.7-beta.0
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.7-beta.0

Added

  • add Copy to Clipboard option for word and sentence translation
  • add Show Dock Icon toggle in System tab
  • add localization support for Learning module
  • add word learning module with spaced repetition

Changed

  • remove Spanish language support
  • add System tab and move launch/menu bar/language settings
  • remove fixed width from filter picker for compact layout

Fixed

  • persist showDockIcon setting across app restarts
  • hide Dock icon immediately when toggle is turned off
  • move Learning tab below pronunciation options

item.title: Version 1.3.6
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.6

Added

  • add smart positioning for word translation panel

Changed

  • add sentence and paragraph translation features to documentation
  • fix GitHub repository URL in documentation

Fixed

  • avoid false alerts after login launch
  • sync language pack status on startup
  • add stable releases to both appcast files

item.title: Version 1.3.6-beta.2
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.6-beta.2

Added

  • add smart positioning for word translation panel

item.title: Version 1.3.6-beta.0
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.6-beta.0

Changed

  • add sentence and paragraph translation features to documentation
  • fix GitHub repository URL in documentation

Fixed

  • sync language pack status on startup
  • add stable releases to both appcast files

item.title: Version 1.3.5
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.5

Added

  • split App Store and direct builds

Changed

  • remove unused online dictionary services
  • point release scripts at direct scheme

Fixed

  • improve phonetic extraction and validation
  • cleanup state when double-tap with sentence translation disabled
  • stabilize short translation overlay sizing
  • share bundle id across channels

item.title: Version 1.3.5-beta.2
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.5-beta.2

Changed

  • remove unused online dictionary services

Fixed

  • improve phonetic extraction and validation
  • cleanup state when double-tap with sentence translation disabled
  • stabilize short translation overlay sizing

item.title: Version 1.3.5-beta.1
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.5-beta.1

Added

  • split App Store and direct builds

Changed

  • point release scripts at direct scheme

Fixed

  • share bundle id across channels

item.title: Version 1.3.5-beta.0
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.5-beta.0

Added

  • split App Store and direct builds

Changed

  • point release scripts at direct scheme

item.title: Version 1.3.4-beta.11
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.4-beta.11

Added

  • support macOS 14.0+ with graceful translation fallback

item.title: Version 1.3.4-beta.10
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.4-beta.10

  • Version 1.3.4-beta.10 release

item.title: Version 1.3.4-beta.6
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.4-beta.6

Fixed

  • add SUPublicEDKey to fix Sparkle auto-update signature verification

item.title: Version 1.3.4-beta.5
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.4-beta.5

Added

  • 改进更新检查按钮交互体验
  • 根据更新通道跳转到对应的 GitHub Release 页面

item.title: Version 1.3.4-beta.4
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.4-beta.4

Fixed

  • 下拉菜单中连续翻译选项不显示勾选状态的问题
  • 切换更新频道后无法立即生效的问题
  • debug模式下检查更新通道选择器不生效的问题

item.title: Version 1.3.4-beta.3
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.4-beta.3

Added

  • Add debug toggle for GitHub release channel selector in menu bar for testing

Fixed

  • Make update channel selector toggle work in real-time without restart
  • Relax OCR selection and merge split lines in paragraph mode
  • Size paragraph text from actual panel width
  • Only show update channel options for GitHub releases
  • Move debug OCR option and auto-disable on sentence translation
  • Prevent panel from showing without screen recording permission
  • Increase about page height for GitHub releases

item.title: Version 1.3.4-beta.2
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.4-beta.2

Fixed

  • align Sparkle feeds and GitHub build versioning

item.title: Version 1.3.4-beta.0
item.description:
SnapTra Translator 1.3.4-beta.0

Added

  • add update channel selector for GitHub releases

Fixed

  • correct distribution channel detection logic
